title: UDS Components Manifest
description: List of all components in this UDS release. The single source of truth for 'which components exist'. Generated by scripts/aggregate-components.sh — do not edit by hand. Used by docs/app.js to know which components to load + render.

components.description: Components in display order (earliest UDS version first, alphabetical tiebreak)

since.description: First UDS version this component appeared in
